description: Testing the visual presentation and text quality of the quiz interface.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify layout and format of Quiz
expected_result: - All layout and format are the same with design

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check Spelling in Quiz
expected_result: - All texts are displayed correct spelling

description: Testing access control based on publishing status, authentication, and user permissions.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify user can access Quiz successfully when it in public time
expected_result: - Access Quiz successfully

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify Quiz is not available to do when it has not been published yet
expected_result:
- Quiz is not displayed
- Access denied when user access by input URL

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify Quiz is no longer available to do when published end date > current date
expected_result:
- Quiz is not displayed
- Access denied when user access by input URL

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify user can not access Quiz without logging into system by input URL
expected_result:
- Navigating to Login Screen 
[base on spec]

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify user can not access Quiz if user does not have permision by input URL
expected_result: - Error message displays

description: Testing information display and validation of required fields before quiz initiation.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify all information displays corresponding information set on Admin page
expected_result: - All information displays corresponding information set on Admin page

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify all required fields must be filled correctly to start Quiz
- type of data
expected_result:
- All infor is saved successfully
- Navigating to Quiz

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify error message displays when user inputs invalid data into fields
- let required fields empty
- input invalid format data (email, phone, ...)
- input more than max length characters
expected_result:
- Error message displays
- Can not start quiz

description: Testing core quiz functionality including question display, answer submission, navigation controls, progress tracking, and time management.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify all questions displays correctly and fully like Admin set
- question & answer respectively
- question order like admin set
- no answer is chosen/filled
- total page number of questions
- total page of quiz
expected_result: - All questions displays correctly and fully like Admin set

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify user can choose/input Answer successfully base on question's type:
- Choose only one answer
- Choose more than 1 answer
- Input answer
expected_result:
- User can choose/input Answer successfully
- Answer is saved temporary

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify user can do some action in Quiz
[base on spec]
- skip question
- move to the next question
- move to the previous question
- jump to any question by question map
expected_result:
- Do action successfully
- Keep answers user has chosen/inputted

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify "Previous" button displays and works correctly in Quiz
expected_result:
- Do not display Previous btn on the First Question/Page
- Previous btn displays from the 2nd Question
- Move to correct previous question/page when clicking on Previous button
[base on spec]
- Chosen/Inputted data on each page is kept when clicking on Previous button

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify "Next" button displays and works correctly in Quiz
expected_result:
- Do not display Previous btn on the Last Question/Page
- Next btn displays on all Question/Page remaining
- Move to correct next question/page when clicking on Next button
[base on spec]
- Chosen/Inputted data on each page is kept when clicking on Previous button

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify "Skip" button displays and works correctly in Quiz
expected_result:
- Display Skip button on every Question/Page
- Move to correct next question/page or the first question/page (if on the last question/page) when clicking on Skips button
[base on spec]
- No answer is saved temporary when clicking on Skip btn

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify error/warning message displays when user clicks to next question while has not chosen/inputted answer of current question yet
expected_result:
- Error/Warning message displays
- Can not move to other question

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify error message displays when user inputs invalid data into answer fields
- input more than max length characters of fields
expected_result:
- Error message displays
- Answer is not saved

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify progress bar displays correctly (if have)
- percent completed
- percent incompleted
expected_result: - Progress bar displays correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify countdown time displays correctly
- remaining time
- format of time
- remind time
expected_result: - Countdown time displays correctly

description: Testing quiz behavior during browser interactions like tab switching, page reloads, and session management.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify warning message displays when user switches to other tab in Quiz 
[base on spec]
expected_result:
- Warning message displays
- Quiz is continue normally or Quiz is stopped [base on spec]

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify warning message displays if user reloads page when quiz is in-progress
[base on spec]
expected_result:
- Warning message displays
- Quiz is continue normally or Quiz is stopped [base on spec]

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify warning message displays if user closes tab when quiz is in-progress
[base on spec]
expected_result:
- Warning message displays
- Quiz infor is saved/is not saved  [base on spec]

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify Quiz is continued from current question when user get URL and paste to other tab
[base on spec]
expected_result:
- Quiz is continue normally, all inputted answer is kept
- Current tab is out of session
[base on spec]

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify navigating to Login screen when Quiz is in-progress but user logged out on other tabs
expected_result:
- Navigating to Login Screen 
- Quiz infor is saved/is not saved 
[base on spec]

description: Testing quiz result calculation, display, review functionality and result persistence.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify Quiz's result is displayed when quiz is finished (user finish or time's up)
expected_result: - Quiz's result page displays

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify result is Passed when score is equal or more than score to Pass
expected_result: - Reult is Passed

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify result is FAILED when score is less than score to Pass
expected_result: - Result is Failed

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify Result of Quiz displays all informations correctly
- Score
- Passing score
- Result: Passed/Failed
- Elapsed time
- Other message
expected_result: - Result of Quiz displays all informations correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify scroce is calculated correctly for each question:
- correct answer
- correct a part of answer
[base on spec]
expected_result: - Scroce is calculated correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify total score of Quiz is calculated correctly
expected_result: - Scroce is calculated correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify user can review answers
[base on spec]
expected_result:
- All Questions & answer respectively displays correctly
- Displays answer of user
- Displays correct answer
- Notice correct/incorrect answer
- Display score of question (if have)

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify Quiz's result of user is saved into DB correctly
expected_result: - All result is saved on DB and displayed correctly on Admin page

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify user can do Quiz only one time/or take quiz again
[base on spec]
expected_result:
- If user can do Quiz only one time: Can not access quiz again, error message displays
- If user can do Quiz many times: Access quiz successfully
